creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've updated the port ja-vftool-1.2(japanese/vftool). 

Current modifications are :

(1) Release BUILD_DEPENDS japanese/jtex209-* or japanese/ptex-euc
(2) Divide into two parts vftool and vftool-misc
(3) Change DESC or COMMENT

Update files are respecively :

[Add] :
(NONE)
[Delete] :
-rw-r--r--  1    kiri   staff     196 Aug  8 00:32 japanese/vftool/patches/patch-ab
-rw-r--r--  1    kiri   staff    1191 Aug  8 00:32 japanese/vftool/Makefile.inc
-rw-r--r--  1    kiri   staff     257 Aug  8 00:32 japanese/vftool/files/search-pkg.sh
[Update] :

-rw-r--r--  1    kiri   staff     485 Aug  8 00:32 japanese/vftool/patches/patch-aa
-rw-r--r--  1    kiri   staff     206 Aug  8 00:33 japanese/vftool/scripts/configure
